title: Savory Sweet French Almond Wrap
description: A garlicky and chewy French dish featuring almond essence, inspired by the cuisine of Brittany, wrapped in a gluten-free friendly ssam-wrap.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the almond flour, garlic, egg, and almond extract.
Add the butter and salt to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle.
Place a large ssam-wrap on a flat surface and place a dough circle in the center of the wrap.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the dough, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up to form a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining dough and wraps.
Place the wraps on a baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes.
